acceptance_targets: [CH08_CRAFT_01] Reading the revised passages anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:201 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:365, a reviewer should be able to name one distinct emotional turn in each scene; if both scenes still reduce to 'Daro says Riva treats family as tools,' the revision fails.

[CH08_DIALOGUE_01] In the revised exchange spanning snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:365 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:420, at least one of Daro's objections must be unmistakably his because it fuses accusation with bodily or devotional imagery; if the lines could be reassigned to Lale or to a generic sibling quarrel without sounding wrong, the revision fails.

[CH08_PROSE_01] In the revised chapter, no more than two of the cited passages at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:47, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:161, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:263, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:299, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:325, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:361 may still rely on the same negation-to-assertion pattern; the rest must make their turn through materially different sentence shapes or concrete image.

[FBR-009] Pass if the cited span now conveys Daro's reaction through a more specific verbal, bodily, or rhythmic choice and no still/flat placeholder remains there. Fail if the revised line still relies on the same generic reaction template.

findings.acceptance_test: Reading the revised passages anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:201 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:365, a reviewer should be able to name one distinct emotional turn in each scene; if both scenes still reduce to 'Daro says Riva treats family as tools,' the revision fails.
findings.problem: The chapter lands Daro's grievance about being used as an instrument at the end of the rescue scene, then replays essentially the same accusation at the landing without enough new leverage. Because the later argument restates the thesis rather than forcing a fresh turn, the final quarter spends tension explaining an already-legible power struggle instead of sharpening it.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework either the exchange beginning at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:201 or the landing fight beginning at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:365 so the chapter carries one clear 'Riva uses people' beat, not two parallel versions. In the later scene, make the conflict turn on a new local pressure point already on the page: Nami's worsening hand at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:349, the sixth-mouth vision raised at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:409, or Riva's abandonment guilt surfaced at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:381.

findings.acceptance_test: In the revised exchange spanning snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:365 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:420, at least one of Daro's objections must be unmistakably his because it fuses accusation with bodily or devotional imagery; if the lines could be reassigned to Lale or to a generic sibling quarrel without sounding wrong, the revision fails.
findings.problem: Daro's later accusations drift out of his embodied, half-devotional register and into clean abstract indictment. Phrases such as 'weight you throw on every scale,' 'Everything in your mouth turns into cargo,' and 'duty purified' read more like generic literary family-argument rhetoric than this specific character's throat/song/current-driven voice.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise Daro's accusatory lines at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:209, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:387, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:419 so the pressure comes through his own idiom: bodily cost, song, current, omen, hunger, or shame. Use the local benchmark of his tighter, more character-specific lines at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:147 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:153 as calibration, without repeating those lines.

findings.acceptance_test: In the revised chapter, no more than two of the cited passages at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:47, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:161, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:263, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:299, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:325, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:361 may still rely on the same negation-to-assertion pattern; the rest must make their turn through materially different sentence shapes or concrete image.
findings.problem: The chapter repeatedly sharpens meaning through the same negation-pivot sentence shape: 'not X / only Y,' 'he did not ... he did not ...,' or 'no one told ... no one told ...'. Used this often, the maneuver stops feeling pointed and starts feeling like a prose tic, flattening rhythm across otherwise strong scenes.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:47, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:161, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:263, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:299, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:325, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:361, replace several of the negation pivots with direct image, action, or plain assertion so the distinctions land through fresher syntax rather than repeated correction.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the cited span now conveys Daro's reaction through a more specific verbal, bodily, or rhythmic choice and no still/flat placeholder remains there. Fail if the revised line still relies on the same generic reaction template.
findings.problem: This chapter repeats the book-wide still/flat template when Daro's face "went flat." At this point in the novel the phrasing no longer feels like deliberate motif; it flattens a pressure point that should be more particular to Daro's injury, vanity, and resentment.
findings.rewrite_direction: REPLACE the beat at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3330-3334 with a reaction that shows Daro's hurt hardening into spite or performance without using the stock face-flat stillness phrasing.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the collision of sanctity, lust, labor, rot, and family resentment. In edge cases, choose the more concrete, uncomfortable, and character-specific rendering over symbolic safety; if an image or action feels too polite for the pressure, it is probably wrong.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, violence, shame, grief, or economic pressure drives a scene, vague language counts as a failed beat; replace euphemism with the exact bodily, social, or material consequence the character experiences.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the norm across dialogue; uncontracted forms are reserved for ritual speech, emphasis, or deliberate character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count, dialogue density, and narrative movement aggressively: follow ordeal with meal, revelation with labor, schism with care, and public spectacle with close-bodied aftermath so no adjacent chapters share the same structural rhythm.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, bodily, locally sacred, and unsanitized; lyrical only when pressure earns it, never as a decorative default.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person rotating among the five siblings; each scene stays inside one consciousness and lets the river press through perception rather than omniscient explanation.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate muscular propulsion with denser lyric accumulation; peak scenes should tighten and clarify rather than dissolve into fragmentary haze.
